visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit Costco warehouse frozen food section, a female with long dark hair and a black top holds a box of 'Shrimp Fritter - Honey & Spicy'. She stands before glass freezer doors containing various frozen items. Large red and blue 'Costco Wholesale' logos and yellow variety captions appear as she speaks enthusiastically toward the camera. (2) The camera performs a digital zoom onto the product packaging, highlighting images of golden fried shrimp and honey. The background freezer shelves are slightly blurred. The woman points at details on the box, her facial expressions conveying excitement while explaining the product. Text overlays indicating weight and price appear at the bottom. (3) The scene cuts to an indoor kitchen environment with soft, warm lighting. Two females, one in a black top and another in a zebra-patterned bucket hat, sit behind a table with the shrimp box and a plate of fried food. They hold up a small bowl of red sauce, gesturing with their hands while talking. (4) Close-up shots show a golden-brown breaded shrimp being dipped into the red sauce. The textures of the food are sharp and well-lit. The two women are seen reacting to the taste, showing wide eyes and animated facial expressions. They point toward the plate and the packaging during their discussion. (5) One woman uses her fingers to demonstrate the small size of the shrimp found inside the thick breading. Both women are laughing and using wide hand gestures. Colorful 'Variety' style captions emphasize their reactions on screen. The background includes a neutral wall, a sofa, and plush toys, creating a casual atmosphere.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超酥脆. [Slogan]: 冷凍酸甜炸蝦. (2) [Subtitle]: 908公克599元. (3) [Subtitle]: 看起來超好吃的哎. (4) [Subtitle]: 你看蜂蜜. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且最重要是它可以用氣炸鍋. (6) [Subtitle]: 聽起來就很方便回家試試看好不好吃. (7) [Subtitle]: 它是泰國蝦哦我們帶回家. (8) [Subtitle]: 這個炸蝦呢599元裡面有兩袋一袋是300塊我們熱了半袋來吃. (9) [Subtitle]: 如果你很喜歡蜂蜜的香甜的話那他的醬真的很特別因為他的醬就是完整的蜂蜜配上一點辣辣的感覺. (10) [Subtitle]: 可是呢整個只吃得到酥皮裡面的蝦子真的是好小好小哦. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你愛吃醬的話這款適合你錢很多的話這款適合你愛吃蝦子的人我的蝦子在哪裡?. (12) [Slogan]: 我的蝦子在哪裡?. (13) [Subtitle]: 他的蝦子不小只是粉太厚. (14) [Subtitle]: 它是一整條他不是不給他有一整條蝦只是他粉太厚然後整個粉跟醬的味道會蓋住那個蝦子可惜了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing sequentially and then together.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female with long black hair in a black top; another female with a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a tan top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco warehouse frozen food aisle with metal shelves and glass-door freezers. Second scene is a home interior with a table, neutral walls, and toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female greeting and introduction, characterized by a rapid speech rate and high pitch contour. The background music is a bright, electronic-pop track with a strong 4/4 beat. Short 'pop' sound effects occur every time a text graphic appears, synchronized with the visual transitions. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect highlights the mention of the product's price. The narrator's voice maintains high arousal and a friendly, persuasive tone. The background music continues at a steady volume, serving as a energetic bed for the narration without any structural gaps or interruptions. (3) The audio texture shifts as a second female voice joins in a duo conversational format. Their speech is characterized by laughter and overlapping enthusiasm. The BGM remains consistent but is mixed slightly lower to ensure vocal clarity. The room tone changes from a wide warehouse echo to a dryer, closer indoor resonance. (4) Vocal prosody changes to a more critical but still humorous tone as the speakers describe the ratio of breading to shrimp. The pitch variability remains high with many rising intonations. Subtle production artifacts like quick 'swoosh' sounds accompany scene changes, maintaining a high level of audio event density. (5) The final phase features a climax in vocal energy as the speakers joke about the shrimp size. The BGM maintains its tempo and rhythmic drive until the clip ends abruptly with a hard cut. The overall signal-to-noise ratio is excellent, with voices clearly distinguished from the synthetic BGM and SFX layers.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information -> Review -> Comparison -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a specific frozen shrimp product from Costco, detailing its price and taste while highlighting a critique regarding the thickness of the breading compared to the shrimp size.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of branding, pricing information, and detailed product testing characteristic of influencer reviews.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media style short video review with high text density and energetic pacing, focusing on consumer advice for a specific supermarket product.
